name: AscoBreastCancerGuidelineRecommendationR22NoBiomarkers
title: Do not use blood or tissue biomarkers for monitoring
description: Ongoing assessment while the patient is receiving neoadjuvant therapy.

action.description: Do not use blood-based or tissue-based biomarkers to monitor patients receiving neoadjuvant therapy.

documentation.citation: Blood-based and tissue-based biomarkers should not be used to monitor response during neoadjuvant therapy. Evidence: korde-et-al-2021-neoadjuvant-chemotherapy-endocrine-therapy-and-targeted-therapy-for-breast-cancer-asco-guideline_pdf: The Bottom Line, Recommendation 2.2
documentation.label: claim-r2-2

action.title: Do not use blood or tissue biomarkers for monitoring
